milestones.title: Foundation & First Project
milestones.unlock_statement: Aryan, you'll set up your first coding environment and write a simple REST API in Python, understanding how to handle GET and POST requests.

milestones.title: Core Skills Unlocked
milestones.unlock_statement: You'll be able to explain the basics of database design and implement a simple CRUD application using MySQL and Python, showcasing your understanding of backend development fundamentals.

milestones.title: Junior Dev Ready
milestones.unlock_statement: Aryan, you'll design and implement a simple e-commerce API, handling user authentication and authorization, and demonstrating your ability to work with APIs and databases.

milestones.title: Mid-Level Engineer
milestones.unlock_statement: You'll lead a team project, designing and implementing a scalable backend system, and mentoring junior developers on best practices and coding standards, showcasing your leadership and technical skills.

milestones.title: Senior Developer
milestones.unlock_statement: Aryan, you'll architect a complex backend system, integrating multiple services and APIs, and ensuring high availability and scalability, demonstrating your expertise in system design and architecture.

milestones.title: Technical Lead
milestones.unlock_statement: You'll drive technical decisions, leading a team of engineers, and ensuring that the technical vision aligns with the company's goals, and mentoring team members on technical skills and career development, showcasing your leadership and technical expertise.

milestones.title: Architect & Leader
milestones.unlock_statement: Aryan, you'll be a recognized expert in your field, speaking at conferences, and leading large-scale technical initiatives, and shaping the technical direction of the company, demonstrating your thought leadership and technical vision.
